requirement_topic.en: MEW Grid-Connection Evidence — 240/415 V, 50 Hz Kuwait Network and IEC Interconnection Tests
requirement_topic.zh: MEW并网证据——科威特240/415 V、50 Hz电网及IEC互联测试
requirement_topic.zht: MEW併網證據——科威特240/415 V、50 Hz電網及IEC互聯測試

summary.en: Kuwait's Ministry of Electricity, Water & Renewable Energy (MEW) is the electricity authority for network connection and project-level technical review. Publicly accessible Kuwait PV-inverter model-list or inverter-specific grid-code documents were not confirmed during this draft review, so exporters should treat MEW and project-owner engagement as a required project gate. Kuwait low-voltage supply is commonly specified as 240/415 V at 50 Hz. PV inverter packages should therefore include IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence where requested, and model-specific protection-setting documentation for Kuwait's 240/415 V, 50 Hz conditions.
summary.zh: 科威特电力、水和可再生能源部（MEW）是电网接入和项目层面技术审查的电力主管机构。本草案审查期间未确认可公开获取的科威特光伏逆变器型号清单或逆变器专用并网规范，因此出口商应将MEW和项目业主沟通视为必要项目门槛。科威特低压供电通常按240/415 V、50 Hz说明。光伏逆变器文件包因此应包括IEC 62116防孤岛证据、在被要求时提供IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，以及针对科威特240/415 V、50 Hz条件的型号专用保护整定文件。
summary.zht: 科威特電力、水和可再生能源部（MEW）是電網接入和項目層面技術審查的電力主管機構。本草案審查期間未確認可公開取得的科威特光伏逆變器型號清單或逆變器專用併網規範，因此出口商應將MEW和項目業主溝通視為必要項目門檻。科威特低壓供電通常按240/415 V、50 Hz說明。光伏逆變器文件包因此應包括IEC 62116防孤島證據、在被要求時提供IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，以及針對科威特240/415 V、50 Hz條件的型號專用保護整定文件。

standards_or_laws: MEW project-level electricity network connection and technical review requirements
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Kuwait electricity system context — 240/415 V, 50 Hz low-voltage supply

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station connection, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test records. These documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and Chinese grid-operator procedures. They are useful technical background but should not be presented as MEW grid-connection acceptance evidence for Kuwait.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求以及国内防孤岛测试记录。上述文件基于中国电网条件和中国电网运营商程序，可作为技术背景资料，但不应作为科威特MEW并网接受证据提交。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求以及國內防孤島測試記錄。上述文件基於中國電網條件和中國電網運營商程序，可作為技術背景資料，但不應作為科威特MEW併網接受證據提交。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid documents do not demonstrate acceptance against Kuwait's MEW project requirements or Kuwait 240/415 V settings. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding reports, IEC 61727 utility-interface reports where required, firmware setting tables, reconnection and protection-delay documentation, and project-specific statements confirming the tested configuration. Where no Kuwait-specific published inverter grid code is available, obtain written requirements from MEW, the utility interface engineer, or the project owner before testing.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件不能证明符合科威特MEW项目要求或科威特240/415 V参数。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛报告、在被要求时准备IEC 61727公用电网接口报告、固件整定表、重连和保护延时文件，以及确认测试配置的项目专用声明。若无法取得已公开发布的科威特逆变器专用并网规范，应在测试前向MEW、公用电网接口工程师或项目业主取得书面要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件不能證明符合科威特MEW項目要求或科威特240/415 V參數。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島報告、在被要求時準備IEC 61727公用電網介面報告、韌體整定表、重連和保護延時文件，以及確認測試配置的項目專用聲明。若無法取得已公開發布的科威特逆變器專用併網規範，應在測試前向MEW、公用電網介面工程師或項目業主取得書面要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for MEW project grid connection and owner acceptance; exact published inverter-specific requirements must be confirmed with MEW or the project interface engineer
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese grid and certification contexts but does not transfer to Kuwait MEW acceptance

source.publisher: Ministry of Electricity, Water & Renewable Energy (Kuwait)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408 as Kuwait MEW grid-connection evidence. Build a Kuwait package around IEC 62116, IEC 61727 where required, and documented 240/415 V, 50 Hz firmware settings. Because a public Kuwait PV-inverter-specific grid code was not confirmed, obtain written project requirements from MEW or the project owner before final testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要将GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408作为科威特MEW并网证据。应围绕IEC 62116、在被要求时的IEC 61727，以及有记录的240/415 V、50 Hz固件设置建立科威特文件包。由于尚未确认公开的科威特光伏逆变器专用并网规范，最终测试前应向MEW或项目业主取得书面项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要將GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408作為科威特MEW併網證據。應圍繞IEC 62116、在被要求時的IEC 61727，以及有記錄的240/415 V、50 Hz韌體設置建立科威特文件包。由於尚未確認公開的科威特光伏逆變器專用併網規範，最終測試前應向MEW或項目業主取得書面項目要求。

requirement_topic.en: KUCAS / PAI Import Conformity Gate for Grid-Connected PV Inverter Shipments
requirement_topic.zh: 并网光伏逆变器货物的KUCAS / PAI进口合格评定门槛
requirement_topic.zht: 併網光伏逆變器貨物的KUCAS / PAI進口合格評定門檻

summary.en: Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme (KUCAS) is administered by the Public Authority for Industry (PAI). Regulated products require conformity handling before import, commonly including a Technical Evaluation Report (TER) and Certificate of Conformity (CoC). A PV inverter's KUCAS treatment depends on product classification, HS code, voltage rating, shipment route, and the current regulated-product list. KUCAS/PAI conformity does not replace MEW grid-connection approval, but it can be a separate customs and import gate for inverter shipments.
summary.zh: 科威特合格保证计划（KUCAS）由公共工业局（PAI）管理。受监管产品进口前需要办理合格评定，通常包括技术评估报告（TER）和合格证书（CoC）。光伏逆变器的KUCAS处理取决于产品分类、HS编码、电压等级、货运路径和现行受监管产品清单。KUCAS/PAI合格评定不能替代MEW并网批准，但可能是逆变器货物独立的清关和进口门槛。
summary.zht: 科威特合格保證計畫（KUCAS）由公共工業局（PAI）管理。受監管產品進口前需要辦理合格評定，通常包括技術評估報告（TER）和合格證書（CoC）。光伏逆變器的KUCAS處理取決於產品分類、HS編碼、電壓等級、貨運路徑和現行受監管產品清單。KUCAS/PAI合格評定不能替代MEW併網批准，但可能是逆變器貨物獨立的清關和進口門檻。

standards_or_laws: KUCAS — Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme, administered by PAI
PAI conformity and standards services, including Kuwait standards and conformity functions
GSO / GCC standards where adopted into Kuwait technical regulations

summary.en: China-side factory certificates, CQC/CGC voluntary certificates, CNAS laboratory reports, and CCC status checks are not Kuwait import conformity documents. They may support a technical file, but the importer or appointed conformity body still needs to determine KUCAS scope and issue the required TER/CoC pathway when the shipment is regulated.
summary.zh: 中国侧工厂证书、CQC/CGC自愿认证、CNAS实验室报告和CCC状态核查并不是科威特进口合格评定文件。它们可以支持技术文件，但进口商或指定合格评定机构仍需判定KUCAS范围，并在货物受监管时办理所需TER/CoC路径。
summary.zht: 中國側工廠證書、CQC/CGC自願認證、CNAS實驗室報告和CCC狀態核查並不是科威特進口合格評定文件。它們可以支援技術文件，但進口商或指定合格評定機構仍需判定KUCAS範圍，並在貨物受監管時辦理所需TER/CoC路徑。

standards_or_laws: CQC/CGC voluntary PV inverter certification schemes
GB/T 37408-2019 and NB/T 32004-2018 technical reports used in China

gap.en: Gap: a Chinese inverter technical file does not itself clear KUCAS import conformity. Before shipment, confirm HS code and regulated-product scope with the Kuwait importer, PAI/KUCAS channel, or appointed conformity assessment provider. Prepare Arabic/English product identification, model-family control, IEC reports, factory quality documentation, invoice and packing details, and any TER/CoC forms required for the selected route.
gap.zh: 差距：中国逆变器技术文件本身不能完成KUCAS进口合格评定。出货前，应与科威特进口商、PAI/KUCAS渠道或指定合格评定服务商确认HS编码和受监管产品范围。应准备阿拉伯语/英语产品识别、型号系列控制、IEC报告、工厂质量文件、发票和装箱资料，以及所选路径所需的任何TER/CoC表格。
gap.zht: 差距：中國逆變器技術文件本身不能完成KUCAS進口合格評定。出貨前，應與科威特進口商、PAI/KUCAS渠道或指定合格評定服務商確認HS編碼和受監管產品範圍。應準備阿拉伯語/英語產品識別、型號系列控制、IEC報告、工廠品質文件、發票和裝箱資料，以及所選路徑所需的任何TER/CoC表格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter shipment falls within current KUCAS regulated-product scope; separate from MEW grid approval
mandatory_status.cn: China voluntary PV inverter certification and domestic grid evidence do not create Kuwait import clearance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat KUCAS/PAI import conformity as a separate gate from MEW grid connection. Confirm the current regulated-product scope and TER/CoC route for the exact inverter shipment before dispatch from China. Chinese GB/T, NB/T, CQC, CGC, or CNAS documents can support a file but do not replace Kuwait KUCAS documentation when KUCAS applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将KUCAS/PAI进口合格评定视为独立于MEW并网的门槛。中国发货前，请确认具体逆变器货物的现行受监管产品范围及TER/CoC路径。中国GB/T、NB/T、CQC、CGC或CNAS文件可以支持技术档案，但在KUCAS适用时不能替代科威特KUCAS文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將KUCAS/PAI進口合格評定視為獨立於MEW併網的門檻。中國發貨前，請確認具體逆變器貨物的現行受監管產品範圍及TER/CoC路徑。中國GB/T、NB/T、CQC、CGC或CNAS文件可以支援技術檔案，但在KUCAS適用時不能替代科威特KUCAS文件。
